---
title: "Schedule"
sidebar: false
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
page-layout: full
---

::: {.schedule-page}

Here is the 15-week learning journey for BER 640. Each week includes readings, lab exercises, and assessments designed to build your statistical skills progressively.

::: {.callout-tip}
## How to Read This Schedule

- {{< fa book-open >}} **Lecture**: Read the textbook chapter(s)
- {{< fa laptop-code >}} **Lab**: Complete the hands-on R tutorial
- {{< fa pencil >}} **Homework**: Submit assignments (when due)
- {{< fa clipboard-list >}} **Project**: Submit project deliverables (when due)
- {{< fa circle-check >}} **Quiz**: Take the module quiz (when due)
:::

---

## Module 1: Foundations of Regression (Weeks 1--3)

### Week 1: Welcome & R Setup {#week-1}

- {{< fa book-open >}} [Content](/content/01-content.qmd)
- {{< fa laptop-code >}} Lab 01: Intro to R ([R Lab Book]({{< var books.r_lab_book >}}){target="_blank"})
- **Topics**: Course orientation, R/RStudio setup, data structures, basic operations

### Week 2: Simple Linear Regression I {#week-2}

- {{< fa book-open >}} [Content](/content/02-content.qmd)
- {{< fa laptop-code >}} Lab 02: Simple Regression
- **Reading**: [Ch 01: Simple Linear Regression]({{< var books.lecture_notes >}}/chapters/01-simple-linear-regression.html){target="_blank"}
- **Topics**: OLS estimation, R-squared, equivalence to *t*-test

### Week 3: Simple Linear Regression II {#week-3}

- {{< fa book-open >}} [Content](/content/03-content.qmd)
- {{< fa laptop-code >}} Lab 02 (continued)
- **Reading**: Ch 01 (continued)
- {{< fa pencil >}} [HW 01: Simple Regression](/assignment/hw01.qmd) --- due this week
- {{< fa pencil >}} [HW 02: Dummy Regression](/assignment/hw02.qmd) --- due this week
- {{< fa circle-check >}} Quiz 1

---

## Module 2: Categorical Predictors (Weeks 4--5)

### Week 4: ANCOVA {#week-4}

- {{< fa book-open >}} [Content](/content/04-content.qmd)
- {{< fa laptop-code >}} Lab 03: ANOVA & ANCOVA
- **Reading**: [Ch 02: ANCOVA]({{< var books.lecture_notes >}}/chapters/02-ancova.html){target="_blank"}
- **Topics**: Categorical predictors, covariate adjustment, group comparisons

### Week 5: One-Way ANOVA {#week-5}

- {{< fa book-open >}} [Content](/content/05-content.qmd)
- {{< fa laptop-code >}} Lab 04: Categorical Contrasts
- **Reading**: [Ch 03: One-Way ANOVA]({{< var books.lecture_notes >}}/chapters/03-one-way-anova.html){target="_blank"}
- **Topics**: F-test, multiple comparisons, planned contrasts
- {{< fa pencil >}} [HW 03: Confounding](/assignment/hw03.qmd) --- due this week
- {{< fa pencil >}} [HW 04: One-Way ANOVA](/assignment/hw04.qmd) --- due this week
- {{< fa circle-check >}} Quiz 2

---

## Module 3: Multiple Regression & Interactions (Weeks 6--7)

### Week 6: Continuous Predictors {#week-6}

- {{< fa book-open >}} [Content](/content/06-content.qmd)
- {{< fa laptop-code >}} Lab 05: Multiple Regression
- **Reading**: [Ch 04: Continuous Predictors]({{< var books.lecture_notes >}}/chapters/04-continuous-predictors.html){target="_blank"}
- **Topics**: Partial regression, confounding, centering and scaling

### Week 7: Interactions {#week-7}

- {{< fa book-open >}} [Content](/content/07-content.qmd)
- {{< fa laptop-code >}} Lab 06: Interactions
- **Reading**: [Ch 05: Interactions]({{< var books.lecture_notes >}}/chapters/05-interactions.html){target="_blank"}
- **Topics**: Interaction terms, simple slopes, Johnson-Neyman technique
- {{< fa pencil >}} [HW 05: Interactions](/assignment/hw05.qmd) --- due this week
- {{< fa pencil >}} [HW 06: Two-Way ANOVA](/assignment/hw06.qmd) --- due this week
- {{< fa clipboard-list >}} [Project 1 Proposal](/assignment/project-1-proposal.qmd) --- due this week
- {{< fa circle-check >}} Quiz 3

---

## Module 4: Model Building & Diagnostics (Weeks 8--9)

### Week 8: Nonlinear Relationships {#week-8}

- {{< fa book-open >}} [Content](/content/08-content.qmd)
- {{< fa laptop-code >}} Lab 07: Model Building
- **Reading**: [Ch 06: Nonlinear Relationships]({{< var books.lecture_notes >}}/chapters/06-nonlinear-relationships.html){target="_blank"}
- **Topics**: Polynomial regression, log transformations, splines

### Week 9: Model Building & Diagnostics {#week-9}

- {{< fa book-open >}} [Content](/content/09-content.qmd)
- {{< fa laptop-code >}} Lab 08: Diagnostics
- **Reading**: [Ch 07: Model Building]({{< var books.lecture_notes >}}/chapters/07-model-building.html){target="_blank"} and [Ch 08: Model Diagnostics]({{< var books.lecture_notes >}}/chapters/08-model-diagnostics.html){target="_blank"}
- **Topics**: Variable selection, residual plots, Cook's distance, DFBETAS
- {{< fa clipboard-list >}} [Project 1 Draft](/assignment/project-1-draft.qmd) --- due this week
- {{< fa circle-check >}} Quiz 4

---

## Module 5: Logistic Regression (Weeks 10--11)

### Week 10: Simple Logistic Regression {#week-10}

- {{< fa book-open >}} [Content](/content/10-content.qmd)
- {{< fa laptop-code >}} Lab 09: Logistic Intro
- **Reading**: [Ch 09: Simple Logistic Regression]({{< var books.lecture_notes >}}/chapters/09-simple-logistic-regression.html){target="_blank"}
- **Topics**: Binary outcomes, odds ratios, predicted probabilities

### Week 11: Multiple Logistic Regression {#week-11}

- {{< fa book-open >}} [Content](/content/11-content.qmd)
- {{< fa laptop-code >}} Lab 10: Logistic Extended
- **Reading**: [Ch 10: Multiple Logistic Regression]({{< var books.lecture_notes >}}/chapters/10-multiple-logistic-regression.html){target="_blank"}
- **Topics**: Multiple predictors, average marginal effects, Simpson's Paradox
- {{< fa pencil >}} [HW 07: Logistic Interpretation](/assignment/hw07.qmd) --- due this week
- {{< fa pencil >}} [HW 08: Simpson's Paradox](/assignment/hw08.qmd) --- due this week
- {{< fa circle-check >}} Quiz 5

---

## Module 6: Logistic Diagnostics (Week 12)

### Week 12: Logistic Diagnostics {#week-12}

- {{< fa book-open >}} [Content](/content/12-content.qmd)
- {{< fa laptop-code >}} Lab 11: Logistic Diagnostics
- **Reading**: [Ch 11: Logistic Diagnostics]({{< var books.lecture_notes >}}/chapters/11-logistic-diagnostics.html){target="_blank"}
- **Topics**: Goodness-of-fit, pseudo-R², classification accuracy, binned residuals
- {{< fa clipboard-list >}} [Project 1 Final](/assignment/project-1-final.qmd) --- due this week
- {{< fa clipboard-list >}} [Project 2 Proposal](/assignment/project-2-proposal.qmd) --- due this week
- {{< fa circle-check >}} Quiz 6

---

## Module 7: Generalized Linear Models (Weeks 13--14)

### Week 13: Latent Response & GLM {#week-13}

- {{< fa book-open >}} [Content](/content/13-content.qmd)
- {{< fa laptop-code >}} Lab 12: Logistic Advanced
- **Reading**: [Ch 12: Latent Response & GLM]({{< var books.lecture_notes >}}/chapters/12-latent-response-glm.html){target="_blank"}
- **Topics**: Latent variable formulation, logit vs. probit, GLM components

### Week 14: Ordinal Models {#week-14}

- {{< fa book-open >}} [Content](/content/14-content.qmd)
- **Reading**: [Ch 13: Ordinal Models]({{< var books.lecture_notes >}}/chapters/13-ordinal-models.html){target="_blank"}
- **Topics**: Ordinal logistic regression, proportional odds assumption
- {{< fa clipboard-list >}} [Project 2 Draft](/assignment/project-2-draft.qmd) --- due this week

---

## Module 8: Synthesis (Week 15)

### Week 15: Course Synthesis {#week-15}

- {{< fa book-open >}} [Content](/content/15-content.qmd)
- **Topics**: Reviewing the full learning arc (SLR → GLM), course reflection
- {{< fa file-lines >}} [Project 2 Final](/assignment/project-2-final.qmd) --- due this week

:::
